FENS Seminars-Assoc. Prof. Atay Vural

We would like to thank Assoc. Prof. Atay Vural for his speech on “CD20+ Natural Killer Cells are a Unique, Polyfunctional, Memory-Like Subset That Expands in Inflammatory Conditions”. It was a great seminar!
